description: Style Note If you're a fan of comics and Captain America, this range of T-shirts from free authority is the perfect choice. The print transports you to your childhood fantasies, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day. Pair this with jeans or shorts and slip ons.Product Details Red crew neck T-shirt with short sleeves and Captain America shield on the frontMaterial and Care 100% cotton Hand wash with like colours using a mild detergent Use a non chlorine bleach if needed Warm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
